enriched_points.expanded_content: The dynamic interaction involves forces transmitted between the train wheels and the track, influencing stability, ride comfort, and structural integrity (Zhai, 2019).
Track geometry, including alignment and elevation, significantly affects train dynamics, leading to variations in forces and potential wear over time (Xu, 2019).
Various dynamic models, such as three-dimensional frameworks, simulate train-track interactions, predicting behavior under different operational conditions (Xu, 2023).
